title: Module Check: Binary Search, Heaps, and Monotonic Stacks

questions.question: In the unified binary search template `while lo < hi`, what is the value of `lo` when the loop terminates?
questions.answer: `lo == hi` — pointing to the answer position

questions.question: To find the K largest elements in a stream, do you use a min-heap or max-heap of size K?
questions.answer: Min-heap of size K — the root is the Kth largest; discard smaller elements by comparing to the root

questions.question: What is the recognition pattern for a monotonic stack problem?
questions.answer: For each element, find the nearest element to the left or right that is greater or smaller

questions.question: Why is heapify O(n) and not O(n log n)?
questions.answer: Bottom-up construction processes mostly lower-level nodes with small subtrees; total sift cost sums to O(n) (geometric series convergence)

questions.question: What formula prevents integer overflow when computing binary search midpoint?
